risks.title: Duplicate monitoring events for Security.tsx
risks.evidence: Four events in rapid succession (within 17ms) reporting identical file change; two pairs marked as duplicates with relevance scores ranging 0.2-0.95
risks.recommendedAction: Implement deduplication logic in code-observer to filter duplicate events within same millisecond window; investigate root cause of multi-emission

risks.title: Security file modified without confirmation of validation
risks.evidence: Security.tsx has been changed; no linked test results or security scan confirmation in events
risks.recommendedAction: Verify that automated security tests and linting have been run on changes to Security.tsx before merge

opportunities.title: Enforce automated security testing on sensitive files
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx changes warrant automated validation but no test execution events present
opportunities.suggestedAction: Create git hook or CI rule to auto-run security/auth tests when src/screens/Security.tsx is modified

opportunities.title: Improve event quality and deduplication
opportunities.evidence: Event system producing near-identical duplicates; data quality reduces signal-to-noise ratio
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add event fingerprinting and deduplication window (e.g., ignore same event within 50ms) to code-observer

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Inspect the modifications made to src/screens/Security.tsx to verify no authentication, permission, or sensitive data handling was inadvertently altered
taskCandidates.rationale: Security file changes require manual review; multiple concurrent events suggest active work in progress

taskCandidates.title: Run security and auth test suite
taskCandidates.description: Execute automated tests for security-related modules to validate no regressions in Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.rationale: No test execution events present; security module changes must be validated

taskCandidates.title: Deduplicate code-observer events
taskCandidates.description: Implement event deduplication to filter duplicate file-change events within 100ms window
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events reduce observability quality and complicate analysis

recommendations.title: Establish security file change workflow
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is high-risk; changes warrant formalized review and testing process to prevent vulnerabilities
recommendations.action: Define pre-commit and CI checks for security-sensitive files (*.Security.*); require manual approval and test passing before merge

recommendations.title: Enhance event system robustness
recommendations.rationale: Duplicate events indicate potential monitoring blind spots or system issues
recommendations.action: Add event deduplication middleware to code-observer; log duplicate detection for debugging; consider event signing to detect tampering

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes

pendingApprovals.taskTitle: Run security and auth test suite
pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Run security and auth test suite
